estimated_cost_impact_reasoning: DIPEA 20% output reduction from India supplier. Sensitivity $0.42/kg API per $1/kg DIPEA. Estimated spot premium + allocation adjustment: +$21/kg API. Low-sensitivity parameter (rank 9) but process-critical — no substitute base in Amide Coupling step.
estimated_timeline_reasoning: Alternative DIPEA suppliers (US, EU) can be qualified within 2–3 weeks given non-GMP material status. Short-term airfreight may be required.
caveats: DIPEA classified as indirect China exposure — India production uses CN precursors.
Process-critical despite low cost sensitivity — shortage could halt batches regardless of cost impact.
